drain_assessment.assessment_note: No visible tissue gap, appears to be foam pad training model rather than Penrose drain

technique_summary: Excellent intracorporeal knot tying technique with proper C-loop formation, appropriate hand alternation, and secure final knot. Smooth efficient motion throughout.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly faster transitions between throws to improve overall time
Maintain consistent tension throughout knot construction
